title: Ploybundle
subtitle: Work here first: live status by area, module summaries, and hub actions. Provider consoles are linked under Advanced when you need the native UI.

sections.title: Overview
sections.summary: Project status, health by area, and curated links into your stack.

sections.title: App
sections.summary: App UI, preview, runtime checks, and frontend workflows.

sections.title: Auth
sections.summary: Users, roles, access control, and identity flows.

sections.title: Database
sections.summary: Collections, schema, records, SQL browser, and data operations.

sections.title: Functions
sections.summary: Flows, scripts, API triggers, and execution endpoints.

sections.title: Storage
sections.summary: Object storage, file browser, and asset management.

sections.title: Jobs
sections.summary: Cron jobs, queues, run history, and operational tasks.

sections.title: Logs
sections.summary: Recent container logs (when enabled) and CLI fallbacks.

sections.title: Deploy
sections.summary: Current deploy, logs, env, restart / redeploy.

sections.title: Settings
sections.summary: Board config and safe environment hints (no secret values).

apps.name: Product app (Next.js)
apps.description: Your web UI (Next.js or Vite + React — set `frontend` in ploybundle.yaml)

apps.name: Postgres (Adminer)
apps.description: Raw SQL in the browser. Adminer has no own login: use PostgreSQL credentials — POSTGRES_USER (= project name), POSTGRES_PASSWORD, POSTGRES_DB from .env. Server preset: postgres.

apps.name: Storage (SeaweedFS)
apps.description: Cluster browser UI. Raw S3 API for apps is linked under Backend.

apps.name: Windmill
apps.description: Automations workspace. Self-hosted: complete first-time signup in the UI for your operator account; WINDMILL_SECRET / SUPERADMIN_SECRET is for API/bootstrap, not the browser password.

apps.name: Deploy console
apps.description: CapRover, Coolify, or your control plane

apps.name: S3 API (raw)
apps.description: S3 REST endpoint for integrations (browser view is expected to be limited).

config.blurb: Stay in the hub first: open the Database area for module status, metrics, and curated shortcuts. Directus: ADMIN_EMAIL / ADMIN_PASSWORD (or DIRECTUS_*) in .env. Adminer: POSTGRES_USER / POSTGRES_PASSWORD / POSTGRES_DB — no separate Adminer account.
